features: Rotary volume & tuning control; Mains or battery operation (mains lead included)
Telescopic swivel antenna; Battery operation: 4 x AA (not included)
description: Tune into your favourite AM and FM radio stations with the LLOYTRON "Calypso" 2 Band AC/DC Portable Radio. The retro design will look beautiful in your home and fits in with any room décor both modern and retro, with all the modern features you require including integral carry handle, telescopic swivel antenna, earphone socket, auxiliary input, rotary volume and tuning controls. Listen to traditional AM/FM radio channels or connect to your electronic device via the 3.5mm auxiliary port and play your favourite music through the speakers. This small and stylish radio with retro design is affordable and easy to use. Simply plug into the mains or alternatively power with 4 x AA batteries for portability (batteries not included). Compact and portable, this radio is the ideal accessory for the kitchen, dining room, conservatory or even to be carried out into the garden. Package includes: 1 x LLOYTRON "Calypso" 2 Band AC/DC Portable Radio 1 x Instruction manual
